backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing audio posts with add, edit, remove, retrieval, and per‑user content tracking, guarded by access control mixins and external blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three UI rollback features with associated files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for numerous frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining theme variables for light and dark modes and applying global background and text styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app configuring TanStack Router routes, global providers, layout, and onboarding redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Reusable checkbox grid for selecting user interests with controlled state updates.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter UI rendering selectable category chips with visual active state styling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Dashboard empty state showing welcome text, upload CTA, and a simple profile completion indicator.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Lists the user's audio posts with options to play, edit, and delete, including dialogs and loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Displays user statistics such as total uploads and listens with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Renders an audio item card with playback controls, likes, comments, and delete functionality for drafts or owned posts.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Shows a scrollable list of comments or an empty-state message when none are available.
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Chooses between a custom thumbnail or generated procedural cover image for audio items.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: Provides a searchable multi-select dropdown for choosing and adding custom languages.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays the app's branding banner with a logo and dropdown menu.
Dropdown navigation menu linking to various top-level site pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: Floating button that returns to the feed when no audio is currently playing.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: Floating popover button that filters feed items by language, supports searching and adding custom languages, and hides when mini‑player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Top navigation bar with menu, search, authentication actions, and route-aware navigation handling.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Primary navigation bar rendering Feed, Explore, and Upload links with active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: Multi-step onboarding flow showing feature descriptions with progress, navigation, and completion callbacks.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: Bottom fixed mini audio player with playback controls, progress slider, volume control, and item info.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: Search input that updates feed search query and auto-selects a default language on focus or change.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: Selector for uploading audio files or recording via MediaRecorder with preview, duration limits, and cleanup logic.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: A popover-based category selector allowing users to pick from predefined categories or create custom ones.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: Main audio upload form handling authentication checks, validation, file upload, and submission to backend.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: Hook validating audio file duration against a 3‑hour limit and reporting errors.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines the list of base categories and their Category type.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Maps categories to themed color classes and exports helpers for retrieving them.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines categories and additional topics into a unified interests list.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Exports the full list of supported ISO 639‑1 languages with codes and labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Hook managing custom languages via localStorage, merging them with supported languages, and preventing duplicates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: Fetches the user's audio posts and exposes mutations for editing and deleting them with React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Manages onboarding completion state using localStorage with helpers to mark or reset completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines mutations for creating, listening to, and deleting audio posts, with cache invalidation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: Fetches user statistics from the backend when the actor is available.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables, typography, and custom components like glass buttons and elevated cards.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio posts in localStorage, including saving files as data URLs, retrieving, removing, and notifying listeners.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Provides number and duration formatting utilities for compact numeric output and MM:SS time display.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover art based on category and seed using custom color schemes and waveform patterns.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility to merge Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines mock audio and comment interfaces and exports a list of sample audio items with metadata.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a static About page with placeholder text about the SPEAKR platform.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Implements login and registration forms with state handling and interest selection.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders a static Contact page with placeholder text for future contact info.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows the user dashboard with authentication checks, content stats, and user content sections.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Displays category cards allowing users to filter the feed by selecting a category.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Builds and filters the audio feed using mock, draft, and backend items with search and category filters.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Renders a static Help and FAQ page with placeholder content.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Wraps the onboarding wizard and completes onboarding before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a static Privacy Policy page with placeholder text.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a static Terms of Service page with placeholder content.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Displays the Upload Audio page and renders the upload form.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: Provides audio playback context with play, pause, seek, volume, and progress tracking using an internal HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store managing feed filter state with persistence, including search, category, languages, and auto-select logic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, supporting hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind config extending colors, typography, animations, and layout settings with custom theme values.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing revert-related feature tasks and request tracking.
